seo.title: Nail Salon Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your nail salon. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Nail Salons
hero.subheading: Clients love the set, then leave without thinking about Google. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after the appointment.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Nail Salon Faces

items.heading: A perfect mani doesn’t always become a review
items.body: They’re already planning their week, not your Google listing.

items.heading: One bad experience can show up first
items.body: A single public complaint can shape how new clients choose a salon.

items.heading: Asking at the table feels awkward
items.body: Techs are focused on service, not chasing stars.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Nail Salons

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when they pay and leave.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Fits a busy nail desk
items.body: Send the link right after checkout, before they walk out.

items.heading: Catches issues before they go public
items.body: Private feedback gives you a chance to fix problems first.

items.heading: Same flow for every tech
items.body: One link your whole team can use after every appointment.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will clients leave reviews for nail appointments?
items.a: Yes, when you ask right after the visit while it’s fresh.

items.q: What if someone is unhappy with their nails?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.
No. You can send requests manually by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small salons.

items.q: Can we use this across multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. Use separate links per location so feedback stays organized.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Nail Salon Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
